bridge_to_consumer_rules.rule: Consumer payload may include only allowed_fields plus false/zero authority-lock defense fields.
Forbidden fields must be masked before Consumer Binding.
Fields matching permission/allowed/action/mutation/trigger/payload/execute/order/wallet/trade require mask or rename review.
Masked field must not be displayed in panel or exported into Consumer payload.
Hard-block and policy states render as readonly observation state, never as failed trade/execution.
Missing evidence_ref routes to review_required, never allow/permission.
